chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-1082 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-5050/2024 2. For orders on office objections 3. For orders on MA.5051/2024 4. For hearing of main case. 25-07-2024 None present for petitioner = 1. Granted. 2,3&4. First office objection is in respect of laches. Since, the cause is pleaded to have accrued in 2022 and the petition has been filed in 2024.It is also noted that the prayer clause seeks recovery of contractual dues for which writ jurisdiction is not the proper forum. While the petitioner remains at liberty to agitate his grievance before a Court of competent jurisdiction, subject to the law, no case is made out to entertain this matter in writ jurisdiction of this Court. Petition is found to be misconceived hence dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Ahmed/Pa
